text: I got this weird error when I tried logging in, but I can't remember what it said. What am I supposed to do?

I’ve been trying to access my account for a few days now, but I keep getting a message that my email is associated with another user. I’m pretty sure I’m using the right email, but it’s possible I may have accidentally created a second account. Could you help me figure this out? It’s quite frustrating since I only want to access my original account, which I thought was linked to this email.
my app keeps crashing when I try to upload files, it's really frustating! any fixes?

I’m having this issue where I can’t log into my account anymore, and I’m not really sure why. I received an email about some changes to the terms or something, but it didn’t explain what I need to do next. It’s frustrating because I rely on this for work, and now I can’t access anything. Can you help me figure out what's going on?

Could you please confirm if there are any student discounts available at your establishment, along with the application process? I am interested in enrolling next semester, and it would help greatly. Thank you for your assistance!

I received an email stating my subscription was canceled, but I was never informed of such a decision. This seems to contradict the confirmation I received just last week. Could you clarify this issue?

I would like to request a refund for a recent purchase. Unfortunately, the item arrived damaged and does not match the description provided on your website. Please assist me in processing this refund as soon as possible, as I believe I followed all necessary guidelines.
I really loved your service, but I can't seem to find the latest update anywhere. Is it out yet? I just want to make sure I'm not missing anything important.
I just received a notification that my service is suspended, but I paid my bill yesterday. What's going on?

I've been trying to use the app, but it keeps crashing, and I can't figure out why. I even restarted my phone and cleared some apps to make space, but nothing helps. It's really frustrating because I was on the verge of completing a project, and now I'm stuck. Also, I wonder if it has anything to do with my old phone model, you know? It's still a good phone, just a bit outdated, but this shouldn’t be an issue, right?
I want to return my order because it's not what I expected.

So, um, I’ve been trying to log into my account for ages but it keeps saying my password is wrong even though I’m sure it’s right. I even tried the reset thing but nothin’ seems to work, and it’s gettin’ real frustrating. Can someone help me figure this out? I literally can’t access anything at all!

I’m trying to figure out the billing cycle for the premium subscription because I think I signed up for something else but I am not sure if it's the monthly or yearly plan, and I have trouble finding this info on your site. Can you please clarify that for me? It’s quite confusing!

I really didn’t mean to order two of the same item, but somehow I ended up with two. Can I get a refund for one of them? But also, I actually like both items, so maybe just a credit would work. Not sure?
Is the plan monthly or it’s annual? I can’t tell from the site.
I want to return the shirt I ordered because it doesn’t fit, but I also don’t think I should have to pay for shipping back.
